content:
GitHub Profile: github.com/stlimtat
A curated showcase of open-source libraries, active developments, and configuration systems showcasing expertise in distributed systems, AI/LLM orchestration, game development, physical hardware customizations, and observability platforms.
Featured Projects bunshin-go Status: Active Development · Stack: Go, LangChain/LangGraph (Go port), OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, Ollama, gRPC, Redis, Cobra, Viper
Production-grade LLM pipeline primitives in Go — a port of LangChain, LangGraph, and LangSmith that replaces Python’s GIL-limited async model with native goroutines. Features entity extraction chains, multi-provider agent loops with tool use, HTTP workflow server, compile-time type safety via generics, sub-1ms startup.
Why it exists: Python LangChain is unsuitable for high-throughput inference pipelines (GIL-limited async, high memory, slow startup). bunshin-go solves the latency, memory, and concurrency limitations — same orchestration primitives, Go’s native scheduler.
pigeon-bomber Status: Active Development · Stack: Godot Engine, GDScript
A 2D physics-based action game developed with the Godot Engine. Features structured scene modularity (Main, Player, Background, Target, Explosion, Bomb), customized controls, and an integrated development pipeline equipped with Godot-Vim, Git, and advanced LLM plugins.
remiges-smtp Status: Open Source · Stack: Go, SMTP
High-performance SMTP client in Go with automated local file-scraping capability for dynamic transmission of payload data. Validates idiomatic Go concurrency patterns and robust error handling.
keyball61 Status: Active · Stack: ZMK Firmware, QMK, C/C++
Highly tailored ergonomic layout configuration and ZMK firmware fork for the Keyball61 split mechanical keyboard with integrated physical trackball. Custom-optimized for terminal control and developer velocity.
dotfiles Status: Open Source · Stack: Zsh, Bash
Optimized shell and environment configuration framework (forked from mathiasbynens/dotfiles) for POSIX/macOS systems.
resume Status: Active · Stack: Hugo, GitHub Pages, Markdown
This site. Resume, blog posts, and job search tooling. Deployed via GitHub Pages with Hugo PaperMod. Includes custom Claude Code skills for automated job search workflows and application package generation.
Planned Open Source akashic — Cloud Secrets Library Anime-inspired secrets management library. Reads secrets directly from AWS Secrets Manager and Azure Key Vault into pydantic-settings fields (Python) and struct tags (Go), eliminating manual environment variable re-storage.
Python: pip install akashic Go: go get github.com/stlimtat/akashic Field mapping: explicit annotation per field
summary:

title: Technical Projects

SWEE TAT LIM Singapore | +65 8742 5118 | st_lim@stlim.net | linkedin.com/in/stlim
Work Authorization: Singapore Citizen | New Zealand Permanent Resident (PR) — No visa sponsorship required for SG, NZ, or AU
EXECUTIVE SUMMARY Highly accomplished Principal Solution Architect & Systems Engineer with 27 years of expertise architecting and building high-performance distributed systems, cloud-native platforms, and secure enterprise architectures. Proven track record leading major DevOps transformations, modernizing legacy systems, and engineering high-throughput, low-latency platforms (e.g., handling 3,000+ QPS with <50ms latency in Go).
Actively bridging world-class systems engineering with modern AI Platform / MLOps practices, backed by advanced specializations in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Generative AI from Stanford & DeepLearning.AI. Extensive experience with regulatory compliance (MAS TRM), multi-cloud environments (AWS & Azure), and mentoring cross-functional delivery teams.
TECHNICAL SKILLS AI & Machine Learning (Modern Focus): Large Language Model Orchestration (LangChain, Agentic Workflows), MLOps, Deep Learning, Generative AI, AIOps, Predictive Analytics Ingestion. Architecture & Distributed Systems: Event-Driven Architecture, High-Throughput Streaming, Solution Blueprints, Domain-Driven Design (DDD), Microservices, Resilient Systems. Programming Languages: Golang (Expert), Java, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Bash, SQL. Data & Messaging: Kafka, PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB, Cassandra, Elasticsearch. Cloud & Platform Engineering: AWS, Azure, Kubernetes, Terraform, Helm, Docker, GitOps, CI/CD (GitHub Actions, Jenkins). Security & Compliance: MAS TRM, OAuth2, SAML, mTLS, WebAuthn, OIDC, Keycloak, Open Policy Agent (OPA). Observability & SRE: Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, Sentry, Jaeger, ELK Stack. HIGHLIGHTED EXPERIENCE & PROJECTS Platform Engineer (Consultant) | Protos Labs, Singapore Mar 2026 – May 2026
AIOps Roadmap: Defined and drove a progressive roadmap to AIOps adoption, establishing observability-led incident reduction as a product quality pillar. Stability Improvement: Architected and implemented resilience improvements that measurably reduced production incidents and improved platform uptime. Delivery Velocity: Streamlined CI/CD pipelines and release processes, significantly increasing the velocity of changes shipped to production. Senior Software Engineer | Abnormal Security, Singapore Oct 2021 – Oct 2024
High-Throughput Systems: Delivered a Kafka-powered Golang platform processing 3,000 QPS with <50ms latency, deployed via Kubernetes and managed with Terraform. Optimization & SRE: Reduced infrastructure cloud costs by 20% and boosted resource utilization by 25% through rigorous performance tuning and profiling. Data Engineering: Accelerated customer onboarding from 20 days to 24 hours by redesigning the presales data pipeline using Apache Airflow. Security & Observability: Implemented Monorepo CI/CD strategies with automated security scans and established full OpenTelemetry tracing, Grafana, and Prometheus monitoring. Head of Engineering | Evo Holdings, Singapore 2020 – 2021
Engineering Leadership: Defined the modular, cloud-native technical architecture for a social e-commerce platform on AWS. High Reliability: Engineered transactional services supporting 200 QPS combining Go, Next.js, and multi-database architectures (NoSQL/PostgreSQL). Infrastructure-as-Code: Standardized IaC using Terraform and Helm-driven automated pipelines. Commercial Impact: Supported over $1 Million monthly revenue by ensuring a highly resilient and compliant checkout integration. Solutions Architect | SP Group, Singapore 2018 – 2020
Big Data Telemetry: Designed and deployed a hybrid analytics platform for high-frequency energy telemetry, supporting sub-second time-series ingestion. Latency Reduction: Created ingestion pipelines with custom indexing and backpressure, reducing read latency by 40%. Storage Efficiency: Engineered precision memory and storage profiling, achieving a 30% storage optimization. Product Delivery Manager | Finantix Asia Pacific, Singapore 2016 – 2018
Managed the delivery of 10 modular banking products across distributed international teams (Vietnam, Poland, Italy) valued at $15M. Standardized API specifications and drove DevOps transformation, improving modularity and time-to-market. Technical Lead (Associate Director) | Bank of Singapore 2014 – 2016
Cloud Foundation: Designed and deployed the bank’s cloud foundation and CI/CD strategy fully compliant with MAS TRM standards. Cost Efficiency: Achieved $9M in cost savings through architecture-led optimization of risk management platforms. Earlier Professional Experience Google Solutions Architect | Fronde Systems Group, New Zealand (2012 – 2014) — Architected cloud-native services for government agencies (MSD, NZTE, TEC) with budgets up to NZD 20M. Developer Lead (Associate Director) | Barclays Singapore (2010 – 2012) — Built Java/Spring client reporting platform and unified event pipelines across wealth divisions. Solution Architect | Xuenn Pte Ltd, Singapore (2008 – 2010) — Developed low-latency trading platforms and custom UDP-based protocols. Managing Director | Ernitech Consulting Pte Ltd, Singapore (2003 – 2010) — Delivered bespoke software systems and security audits for government (Mindef, DSTA, IDA) and telcos. EDUCATION, CERTIFICATIONS & UPSKILLING Bachelor of Applied Science (Computer Engineering) – Nanyang Technological University (NTU), 1999 AI & Machine Learning Upskilling (Coursera | 2025): Generative AI for Software Development – DeepLearning.AI Machine Learning – Stanford University & DeepLearning.AI Deep Learning Specialization – DeepLearning.AI Enterprise Architecture & IT Governance: TOGAF 8.1 – Institute of Systems Science (2010) ITIL Foundation – HP Education (2016) Evolutionary Architecture Workshop – O’Reilly (2019) PERSONAL INTERESTS & LANGUAGES Languages: English (Native/Professional), Japanese (Elementary - currently learning actively via Duolingo). Interests: Enthusiastic watcher of Anime; active supporter of children in competitive Pokemon TCG and VGC (Video Game Championships).
